content:
🚀 sparkle | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Debloating and optimizing a Windows PC through a user-friendly application interface.
✨ Key Features: • Apply Tweaks to Optimize your system • Manage All Temp files in one place • Install apps with the built-in Winget integration • Backup and Revert changes • View Basic System info
📖 Summary: Sparkle is a Windows application built with React and Electron, designed to debloat and optimize your PC. It offers features for applying system tweaks, managing temporary files, integrating with Winget for app installations, and backing up/reverting changes.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
